reviews.review_description: The dev abandoned this game and its not worth money in its current state.

So before I bought the full game I played the demo version. I love the game and it's really fun but I think they should add more guns/weapons to the full version to make it more exclusive. Also add more maps and npc skins please. I love this game so please consider adding these. Thank you. 😊
This game needs more Levels very poor development 2stars

The consept of the game is really Good But the missions and graphics is terrible. Enemys know ur location every round. Enemies skins Are horrid and the furthest from realistic. When i got this game i expected it to be like hitman yk. You spawn in with a silenced pistol and a mission, and u can hide behind stuff be silent, or go subdue others. But this.  This is absolute s**t
Please focus on making this game multiplayer!!!!

At first seeing a few pictures and videos I was skeptical but the game is actually pretty good and has decent physics, definitely pretty fun especially if you wanna be like John wick, the ragdoll physics are actually really good and realistic (for the most part)......punching feels pretty good to, the framerate is solid,also love how some levels have physical doors you can push open and I wish more vr games had them

The few things and glitches I noticed: 

Slow motion is a bit broken and slows down your walking speed animation to slow motion all the time after using it once

Other guns besides pistol doesn't do any melee damage

Shot gun is a bit janky pumping it and reloading and pumping audio is a bit loud 

Jumping animation could use a little work

Maybe a better player model down the line

Health regeneration is a bit slow

Sometimes shooting someone from a decent distance doesn't effect the enemy

Maybe make the knock back of enemies a little less and make enemies a little heavier but not by much to make it a little more realistic

Have a few other punching sounds.

Would be cool seeing some cheats like unlimited health to just mess around with the physics and stuff and maybe a free play mode with a quick spawn system.....even after bonlab comes out I can still see myself playing this game, can't wait to see updates

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! I will definitely look into your suggestions!

reviews.review_description: The game offers a lot of game modes, which is the only good thing about it. It steals the characters from Drunkn Bar Fight. There is 3 underwhelming guns and all of the other weapons have horrible mechanics. The NPCS do not vary much and are too powerful. The maps are also stolen from various games. All of the NCPS also scream the phrase, “The enemy is right there! Shoot!” The game modes are all almost the same. The graphics look like they are from the early 2000s. Don’t buy this. Save up for a better one.

developer_response.body: Hi I have all the proper license rights to use everything I used in the game. I am sorry that you have bad experience please email me so that we could discuss more on your issues.

reviews.review_description:
I have some ideas I think you should add
-New npc skins
-assault rifle
-new maps
-snap turn
-option to lower npc voices (it sounds like I’m getting yelled at up close when they are on the other side of the room)
-slow motion
-npcs will fall over if shot in the legs
-if shot in both legs they will be incapacitated and stay on the ground longer
No need to rush mr. developer, this is just what I think would be cool. Have a good day.

developer_response.body: I already added slow motion, assault rifle, smg, shotgun etc. I also reduced AI voices.Next update I will add new AI skins, snap turn etc.

reviews.review_description: You are dead before you can figure out how to load your gun, hate this cheating game

developer_response.body: Hi you are meant to take cover and shoot at enemies.

reviews.review_description: For someone who seems to be new to this type of game especially vr, it can be difficult, it won’t be great as they are starting but I’m willing to stick with it till the game becomes its greatest
I really wish we have the option to have floating hands in this game instead of skinny horrible arms

developer_response.body: OK I will do that as an option in the next update!

reviews.review_description: This game has a lot of good things, the gun-play is on point, the level design is great & the slow motion is really fun to use. Looking forward to what this game has in stall fin the future. Here is some footage https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qNdWglN3u00

This game is. Like being John Wick in a way fast paced cool shooting some scenes are like the movie to the creature of this game don't stop you have a real winner here if you keep going so il be waiting!!!!

reviews.review_title: Any chance we can get a lefty mode?
reviews.review_description: This game is enjoyable but is very difficult for someone who is lefty dominate. I’ve tried switching the controllers in my hands but that does not work unfortunately. I feel like it could be an easy fix but I wouldn’t know how to do it so If you guys could do that the game would be 5 stars.
I was the first person to play this game that i know of, and for a some guy to make a game, this deserves more than 5 stars. i can tell this game is going to be amazing

reviews.review_title: Very good, but short and needs work
reviews.review_description:
I'm surprised, because it's a good game! Total fun, good graphics, cool sound/music. The feeling and the atmosphere are great. But it needs also a lot of work - more maps, more missions, better mission endings, achievements, points, leaderboards..., better AI, a campaign mode (story), target people (boss fights), normal people (not allowed to shoot) and much more. But as I said: It's already really good. I like it and it's a good start. Hope it gets updates.

EDIT 1: With the update there are now two maps and improved AI. Keep up the good work!
EDIT 2: Downgraded to 3 stars. No more game development there - no update since August 2022!
Very good but needs some work

reviews.review_title: Still in Early Acess but already so fun!
reviews.review_description: Love this game. You feel like john wick. After initially being disappointed there was only one level at this stage in early access, I keep coming back to play it (still trying to beat it on expert haha) and I just really enjoy it. Totally scratches that itch of just wanting to mindlessly shoot people and feel like a bad sass. The graphics are really good for quest and there aren't really any games like it on quest. Even on PCVR the only equivalent I can think of is the half-life alyx gunman contracts mod which isn't even a full game. Much love for Hit Contracts VR! :)

developer_response.body: Thank you!. I will definitely consider your suggestions. About AI they do behave differently in melee mode. AI behaviour in shooter mode is intentionally like that so that it won't be too hard for beginners. I will definitely look into adding strafing behaviour in shooter mode. Also more levels will come out soon!. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: I really like the game and it could go big of you are consistent with the updates I only have 1 issue I want to be able to shoot someone is the foot/leg and then fall down or get stunned
One of the best shooters I’ve played in a while
